Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course is fundamentally about HRM principles for organizational productivity, directly supporting Target 8.5 (productive employment) and Target 8.2 (economic productivity).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on '組織發展與變革' (organizational development and change) to improve organizational effectiveness and competitiveness, supporting Target 9.2 (sustainable industrialization) and innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Inferred link to Target 10.3 through principles of fair '人力甄選' (personnel selection) and '薪資管理' (compensation management), though reducing inequality is not an explicit focus.
